name: A watershed journey
description:
You and your girlfriend Cindy have been dating for 8 long years and still love each other. You are the first and only guy in Cindy's life.

One day, your friends Mike and his girlfriend Veronica persuade you to go on vacation with them to a huge house in the city next door, which belongs to Veronica's family.

You agree, but will it be an ordinary friendly trip or something more?

Attention!!!

The story is tied to ntr, cheating and some other tags.

I will be glad to hear your feedback.

Further is better.
creator: Modexon
